Notice Of Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production And An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Terrence C. Heaslett
Off Calendar Feb-01-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: DEFENDANTS BRIAN ROH, SAMMY ROH's Motion For Order Compelling Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Request For Production And An Order Imposing Monetary Sanctions.

Appearances (via Zoom):
Nicholas F Gennaro, Esq., of GILSLEIDER, PHAN, DWYER, TRAN & MEYERS, (925) 446-3041, for Defendants.
No other appearances.

Not argued/contested. The court notes that it did not receive notice of an intent to appear to contest the court's tentative ruling. The tentative ruling is adopted. The unopposed motion of Defendants is granted in its entirety. The request for monetary sanctions is also granted in the amount of $1,260 as to Plaintiff Edson Tlio Olaya Granobl. Plaintiff shall provide verified, code-compliant further responses to the discovery requests that are the subject of this improperly combined motion within 14 days of notice of entry of this order. Plaintiff shall pay the $1,260 monetary sanctions also within 14 days of notice of entry of this order.

The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and must e-mail it to the Judge Pro Tem to williamclynn@gmail.com.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn. Clerk: R. Woods. Not Reported. (302/JPT)
